user.title: Intercom Native
user.description: SIP softphone and SIP bridge/router for ESPHome VoIP phones.

data_description.use_sip: Listen for standard SIP INVITE/OPTIONS/BYE/CANCEL over UDP and TCP.
data_description.sip_port: Listen port for the HA SIP endpoint.
data_description.rtp_port: Base RTP UDP port for HA media and relays.
data_description.advertise_host: Optional override published in ESP phonebooks. Use this when HA is behind routing, NAT, LXC, VPN, or multiple subnets and the automatically announced address is not reachable by ESP devices.
data_description.assist_intents: Register optional Assist handlers for call, hang up, answer and decline ("Hey Jarvis, call Kitchen"). Spoken contact names are resolved dynamically against the live intercom phonebook.
